## X-Sense Home Security v1.4.10.6

### 🎥 Cameras
- Warms the X-Sense WebRTC ticket before Home Assistant asks for browser client configuration.
- Passes the X-Sense ticket ICE servers through to Home Assistant WebRTC clients.

### 🎞️ Recordings
- Prefers cached HLS playback over old MP4 cache files.
- Removes duplicate legacy MP4 cache files once a matching HLS cache is ready.
- Keeps the recordings panel on the HLS playback endpoint when both cache formats exist.
